prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约7791→8350→10611→8779→8837，整体呈波动后移趋势，2023年因选科调整出现较大波动（化学组10611），近两年稳定在8800名附近；2025年基准约8837名；该校在江苏物理类招生计划2021年120人、2022年123人、2023年123人、2024年117人、2025年118人；2026年计划124人，较2025 年扩招约5.1%，扩招使竞争略有加剧（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第34名，近年排名稳定在33–34位，属 全国顶尖工科强校；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要因实验室爆炸安全事故引发关注，对报考心理有轻微负面影响；抖音热度排名第23位（较热），短视频平台 曝光度中等偏高，反映报考关注度尚可；历史投档异常记录不明显；土木工程A+、机械工程A-、环境科学与工程A-、电气工程A-、风景园林学A-，共5个A-及以 上学科，工科实力突出，电气、机械等王牌专业对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化、计算机类为高热推荐专业，与重庆大学优 势工科方向高度契合，推高相关专业组报考热度；江苏省2026年普通高考总人数约52.1万，较2025年（物理类26.1万+历史类9.7万）大幅增长，按历史比例估算物理类考生约37.9 万，增幅约45%，竞争显著加剧；重庆大学位于重庆市，非江苏本地高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在江苏招生占比约占总招生计 划的2–3%，属外省中等规模招生，地域偏好对报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8837名、2026年扩招5.1%（位次数字增大方向）、江苏省物理类考生大幅增加 约45%（竞争加剧）、声誉偏负面（轻微负面影响）以及工科专业热度持续高位等多重因素，在此基础上小幅上修30名，预测2026年物理类最低位 次约9137名，区间8637–9637名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7791 → 8350 → 10611 → 8779 → 8837, showing an overall fluctuating and slightly declining trend. In 2023, there was a significant fluctuation due to subject selection adjustments (Chemistry group 10611), stabilizing around 8800 in the past two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 8837. The university's enrollment plan in Jiangsu for Physics Category was 120 in 2021, 123 in 2022, 123 in 2023, 117 in 2024, and 118 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 124, an increase of about 5.1% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 34th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking around 33–34 in recent years, making it a top national engineering powerhouse. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to attention from a laboratory explosion safety incident, which has a minor negative impact on application psychology. It ranks 23rd in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with moderately high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting moderate application attention. There are no obvious historical abnormal admission records. It has 5 A- or above disciplines: Civil Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, and Landscape Architecture A-, highlighting strong engineering capabilities, with flagship majors like Electrical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science are highly recommended popular majors, highly aligned with Chongqing University's advantageous engineering fields, boosting the application popularity of related major groups. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Jiangsu is approximately 521,000, a significant increase from 2025 (261,000 in Physics Category + 97,000 in History Category). Based on historical proportions, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 379,000, an increase of about 45%, significantly intensifying competition. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, not a local university in Jiangsu, so there is no local admission preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangsu accounts for about 2–3% of its total enrollment plan, making it a medium-scale enrollment from other provinces, with a neutral impact of regional preference on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 8837, a 5.1% enrollment expansion in 2026 (ranking number increases), a significant increase of about 45% in Jiangsu Physics Category candidates (intensified competition), a slightly negative reputation (minor negative impact), and sustained high popularity of engineering majors, the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is predicted to be approximately 9137, with a range of 8637–9637, after a slight upward adjustment of 30 places.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 8637–9637, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing, Smart Energy and Advanced Materials), with Tier 1 Excellence Plan, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Future Information, and Computer and Intelligent Software as reach goals, and Tier 3 special classes as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<8637), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 34th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings; as a comprehensive university, it has strong strength in the humanities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion safety incident, which has a minor negative impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 23rd (relatively hot), with overall exposure moderately high; although known for engineering, it also offers humanities and social sciences programs such as law and journalism, and relying on the 985 platform, its humanities majors still have some appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Chinese Language/Literature major is recommended, Law is divided and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangsu ordinary college entrance examination is about 521,000, with an estimated 142,000 History Category candidates based on historical proportions, an increase of about 46% compared to 2025 (97,000), significantly intensifying competition; Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, not a local university in Jiangsu, with no local enrollment preference; only 8 students are admitted in History Category, a very small scale, making ranking fluctuations more sensitive to changes in total candidate numbers.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1599, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged, a significant increase of about 46% in Jiangsu History Category candidates (intensified competition), and a slightly negative reputation (minor negative impact), the ranking is slightly revised upward by 15 places, predicting the 2026 History Category minimum ranking to be about 1614, with a range of 1372–1856.
